ham.subject: Company Leave Policy Update – Effective 1st May 2026
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Hope you are all doing well.

As part of our continuous efforts to improve work‑life balance and align with industry best practices, we have updated our company leave policy. Please review the key changes below:

1. Accrued Leave: All employees now accrue 1.5 days of paid leave per month, with a maximum carry‑over of 20 days.
2. Unpaid Leave: A maximum of 5 days of unpaid leave per calendar year will be granted for personal reasons.
3. SICK Leave: SICK leave will be tracked under the new portal. Click <URL> to view the policy details.
4. Public Holidays: Any public holiday falling on a weekend will be compensated with a substitute day off.

Please download the updated policy document from the intranet and acknowledge receipt by replying to this email by 30th April 2026. For any questions, reach out to HR.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Asha Mehta
HR Manager
